Package org.areslib.math.controller

package org.areslib.math.controller
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.areslib.math
     
    org.areslib.math.estimator

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ArmFeedforward
    A helper class that computes feedforward outputs for a simple arm (single-joint, rotating mechanism).
    BangBangController
    Implements a bang-bang controller, which outputs either full power or no power based on whether the measurement is below the setpoint.
    ElevatorFeedforward
    A helper class that computes feedforward outputs for a simple elevator (vertical mechanism).
    PIDController
    Basic PID Controller.
    ProfiledPIDController
    A PID Controller configured to follow a Trapezoidal Motion Profile.
    SimpleMotorFeedforward
    A simple feedforward model for a motor, containing static, velocity, and acceleration terms.
    TrapezoidProfile
    A standalone trapezoidal motion profile generator, decoupled from any PID controller.
    TrapezoidProfile.Constraints
    Kinematic constraints for the profile.
    TrapezoidProfile.State
    A state along the profile (position + velocity at a point in time).
